message:
feat: rewrite InputArea with cursor-aware editing and ControlledMultilineInput

Replace append-only text input with proper cursor-tracked editing using
buffer utilities. Add emacs keybindings (Ctrl-A/E/F/B/K/U/W), cursor-aware
insert/delete, left/right arrow navigation, and smart up/down that moves
between lines in multiline text but navigates history on first/last line.
Render via ControlledMultilineInput instead of plain Text.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
